Uses of Package
sc.fiji.snt.analysis.growth

Packages that use sc.fiji.snt.analysis.growth
Package
Description
sc.fiji.snt.analysis
Analysis of Trees.
sc.fiji.snt.analysis.growth
Classes for growth analysis of neurites across time
  • Classes in sc.fiji.snt.analysis.growth used by sc.fiji.snt.analysis
    Class
    Description
    GrowthAnalyzer.GrowthPhase
    Represents a growth phase with specific characteristics
    GrowthAnalyzer.GrowthPhaseType
    Types of growth phases
  • Classes in sc.fiji.snt.analysis.growth used by sc.fiji.snt.analysis.growth
    Class
    Description
    GrowthAnalysisResults
    Container class for growth analysis results from GrowthAnalyzer, serving as the primary interface for accessing growth analysis results.
    GrowthAnalysisResults.GrowthSummaryStatistics
    Container for summary statistics across all analyzed neurites.
    GrowthAnalysisResults.NeuriteSelectionCriterion
    Interface for defining neurite selection criteria.
    GrowthAnalyzer.ElongationEvent
    Represents an elongation event
    GrowthAnalyzer.GrowthPhase
    Represents a growth phase with specific characteristics
    GrowthAnalyzer.GrowthPhaseType
    Types of growth phases
    GrowthAnalyzer.RetractionEvent
    Represents a retraction event
    GrowthAnalyzer.TimePoint
    Represents a single time point measurement
    NeuriteGrowthData
    Data container for growth analysis results of a single neurite over time.
